snippet.title: Akrep 14. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Akrep'in bütün bölümleri startv.com.tr'de → https://www.startv.com.tr/dizi/akrep/bolumler

Akrep'e Abone Olmak İçin →  https://bit.ly/akrep-dd-sub

14. Bölüm Özet:

Ferda hapisten çıkar çıkmaz kızı Merve’yi görmek için soluğu köşkte alır. Perihan, Ferda’nın Merve ile konuşmasına engel olur ve ağır sözler sarf ederek Ferda’yı evden yaka paça attırır. Çünkü, artık Perihan’ın tek amacı, kızı Berna’nın katili Ferda’nın hayatını cehenneme çevirmektir.

Ahmet, Ferda’nın karşısına dikilip kızının nerede olduğunu öğrenmek ister. Yıllar sonra karşı karşıya gelen ikilinin geçmiş hesaplaşması, yerini özleme bırakır. Ahmet, kızını bulmak ve Ferda’ya kendini affettirmek için çabalarken, Fikret’e Emgen İlaç’taki hissesini devralmak istediğini söyler. 

Fikret, Ferda’nın köşke gelişi sırasında kozunu kullanarak Merve’ye, annesinin yeni bir ilişkisi olduğunu söyler. Annesi tarafından bir kez daha kandırıldığını düşünen Merve’nin tepkisi ağır olur. Bunun üzerine Ferda, Fikret’e tehditler savurur ve çareyi Ahmet’te arar. Ahmet, kızının yerini söylemesi karşılığında Ferda ile anlaşır ve gerektiğinde çok tehlikeli olabileceğini de Ferda’ya gösterir.

Yapım: 1441 Productions
Yapımcı: İrfan Şahin
Yönetmen: Gökçen Usta
Senaryo: Erkan Birgören

OYUNCULAR
Perihan: Demet Akbağ
Ferda: Evrim Alasya
Fikret: Bekir Aksoy
Aras: Yusuf Çim
Duru: Aslı Melisa Uzun
Ayşem: Beril Pozam
Hacer: Demet Gül
İpek: Esila Umut
Şahin: Taha Baran Özbek
Merve: Müge Su Şahin
Ece: Ahsen Türkyılmaz

#Akrep #affettim

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

snippet.title: Défano Holwijn | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
Défano Holwijn is bijna dagelijks op je beeldscherm met FC Avondklok, maar vergeet niet dat hij met gemak punchlines uit z'n mouw schudt. Hij is weer bij Rotjoch in de studio om je wat barz te brengen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/defano-holwijn-verzet-bergen

#DÉFANOHOLWIJN #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Volg ons ook op:
🔴 Website: https://101barz.nl
🌐 Twitter: https://twitter.com/101barz 
🔵 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/101BarzOfficieel
🟤 Instagram: https://instagram.com/101barznl

Wil jij de redactie iets mailen? Stuur het naar info@101Barz.nl

101Barz is een online platform van BNNVARA, onderdeel van de Nederlandse Publieke Omroep.

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Sunday, March 14 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 6:01 a.m. EDT, or 10:01 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously supported launch of Crew Dragon’s first demonstration mission, RADARSAT Constellation Mission, SXM-7, and five Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9’s first stage on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. Falcon 9’s fairing previously flew on the Transporter-1 mission.

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 5. Bölüm Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halil Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

snippet.title: “Float” Full SparkShort | Pixar
snippet.description:
Pixar Animation Studios and the SparkShorts filmmakers of FLOAT are in solidarity with the Asian and Asian American communities against Anti-Asian hate in all its forms. We are proud of the onscreen representation in this short and have decided to make it widely available, in celebration of what stories that feature Asian characters can do to promote inclusion everywhere.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook

snippet.title: Schoolbezorgd.nl | HERRES #3 | NPO 3
snippet.description:
Broodjes van schoolkantines zijn altijd fokking goor, maar beter dan de sh*t die je van huis mee krijgt amIright? Oh je smeert je eigen boterhammen? Oh ja man, ik ook.
Wanneer de schoolkantine op het Marburg College dichtgaat, komt Tisha met het briljante idee: Schoolbezorgd.nl 

⭐ Meer Herres? Check http://npo3.nu/herres

Welkom op het Marburg VMBO College. De slechtste middelbare school van Nederland. Hier leer je maar één ding - overleven. Dit is het afvoerputje van het Nederlandse schoolsysteem. De docenten hier haten hun werk én hun leerlingen - dus zijn onze vrienden (Dex, Rio, Jayden & Tisha) op elkaar aangewezen. Samen proberen ze te chillen, slapend rijk te worden en uit de sh*t te komen.

localized.title: Schoolbezorgd.nl | HERRES #3 | NPO 3
localized.description:
Broodjes van schoolkantines zijn altijd fokking goor, maar beter dan de sh*t die je van huis mee krijgt amIright? Oh je smeert je eigen boterhammen? Oh ja man, ik ook.
Wanneer de schoolkantine op het Marburg College dichtgaat, komt Tisha met het briljante idee: Schoolbezorgd.nl 

⭐ Meer Herres? Check http://npo3.nu/herres

Welkom op het Marburg VMBO College. De slechtste middelbare school van Nederland. Hier leer je maar één ding - overleven. Dit is het afvoerputje van het Nederlandse schoolsysteem. De docenten hier haten hun werk én hun leerlingen - dus zijn onze vrienden (Dex, Rio, Jayden & Tisha) op elkaar aangewezen. Samen proberen ze te chillen, slapend rijk te worden en uit de sh*t te komen.

snippet.title: Review: Chris Harris drives the new BMW M3 | Top Gear
snippet.description:
It’s here. The sixth generation G80 BMW M3 and *that* massive grille. Being such a controversial car, there was only one person to slot into the carbon bucket seat of this £75k, 503bhp, rear-wheel drive saloon: Craig Revel Horwood. Unfortunately, he wasn’t around, so we put Chris Harris behind the wheel instead. We hope that’s alright. 

Here’s what he had to say in this brand new instalment of Chris Harris Drives…

snippet.title: Illegaal vechten in Zweden | DANNY'S WERELD #6
snippet.description:
Danny Ghosen volgt glazenwasser Ruud Vernooij in zijn passie voor vechten. Ruud heeft in het verleden regelmatig gevochten op straat en is nu MMA-vechter. Hij is verslaafd aan de kick die het één op één gevecht hem geeft. Door de coronapandemie heeft hij echter al een jaar niet in de ring gestaan. Om toch zijn liefde voor het vechten uit te kunnen oefenen doet hij mee aan een illegaal kooigevecht in Zweden. Onder de noemer 'King of the Streets' vinden daar keiharde gevechten plaats. Er gelden namelijk geen regels in de kooi en er wordt met blote vuisten geknokt.

In Danny’s wereld gaat Danny Ghosen op zoek naar waar het wringt in onze maatschappij. Hij praat met mensen die moeilijk toegankelijk zijn en tot nu toe onzichtbaar waren voor het grote publiek, mensen die de grens opzoeken of daar overheen zijn gegaan of mensen die zich buitengesloten voelen. Danny komt overal binnen, vraagt door en oordeelt niet. Of het nou gaat om de nieuwste designerdrugs, slachtoffers van mensenhandel of verspreiders van nepnieuws.

Meer over Danny’s wereld: https://www.vpro.nl/dannyswereld
Meer zien van Danny: https://www.npo.nl/danny

#vpro #dannyswereld

snippet.description:
Comment on appelle un lapin qui a bouffé toutes ses graines ?
(réponse : un céréale-killer)
Les news pour la BD sont ici : https://fr.ulule.com/parole-chat/news/
La boutique ici : https://parole-de-chat.myshopify.com/
► Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/paroledechat_officiel/
► TikTok : https://www.tiktok.com/@paroledechat_officiel

Ici pour m'envoyer des vidéos : https://www.paroledechat.com/proposer-une-video/

Merci à Laurène Sauzet pour les sous-titres.
(ici pour rajouter des sous-titres dans la langue de votre choix : https://www.youtube.com/timedtext_cs_panel?c=UCnrhy622SNPt04Avj5idFIg&tab=2)

► Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/paroledechat
► Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/faireset

Si vous aimez ce que je fais, vous pouvez aussi me soutenir ici : https://tipeee.com/projects/faireset

Musiques : 
Ratatouille's Kitchen - Carmen María and Edu Espinal
(bibliothèque Youtube)

Merci aussi à Patrick Bouchitey, klaatu42, John Lang et Mozinor pour l'inspiration ;) Sur Parole de chat vous trouverez des vidéos de chats... qui parlent !

Un chat qui parle, des chats qui miaulent.
Donc chat drôle, chat ninja et chats jedi !
Mais aussi chat qui miaule, qui chante et parfois dit des gros mots ;)
Il y a aussi chien, mouette, écureuil, araignée, hiboux, furet, lapin, cheval, chouette, chaton mignon, cochon d'inde, raton laveur, un animal, des animaux, un mot clé, des mots clos. Bisous.

snippet.title: Royaume-Uni : la famille royale sort de son silence après l'interview de Meghan et Harry
snippet.description:
La reine Elizabeth II a été "attristée" par les difficultés évoquées par le prince #Harry et #MeghanMarkle, a déclaré mardi #Buckingham Palace dans son premier communiqué après l'interview retentissante du couple aux États-Unis. Concernant les accusations de racisme formulées, le Palais les juge "préoccupantes" et précise qu'elles seront prises "très au sérieux".

snippet.title: Jador❌Tzanca Uraganu❌Florin Salam❌What's UP - FAIMA [videoclip oficial]
snippet.description:
Jador-Tzanca Uraganu-Florin Salam-What's UP - FAIMA


Muzica Marius de la Focsani
Text Marius de la Focsani
Orchestratie Nek Music
Concept video Edi (Next Level)
Video Kamarad - Nek Video


#Jador #TzancaUraganu #FlorinSalam

Versuri
Luxul pe care mi-l permit la banii ce ii castig
Cat platesc eu o vacanta, altii nu castiga-n viata
Ia-o pe asta, ia-o, ia-o
Ciao bella, bella ciao
Ciao, ciao, ciao, ciao

Zece mii, doua zeci de mii
Pentru mine-s jucarii
Unde merg eu nu merg toti
Acolo-s doar mafioti
Si se intra eee
Doar cu invitatie
La costum si papion
Si minim un milion

Lee le lei la
Faima, faima, faima
Lee le lei la
Parfumu’ si haina
Hai li li lai la
Hai li li lai la
Mafia, mafia

Lee le lei la
Faima, faima, faima
Lee le lei la
Parfumu’ si haina
Hai li li lai la
Hai li li lai la
Mafia, mafia

Dimineata ma trezesc
Intr-un pat imparatesc
Beau cafeau ca boieru’
Si-mi astept elicopteru’
Ia mai joaco’ si pe asta
Si pe asta, si pe asta
Aoleo, va cade masca
Am designer, ma imbraca
De la blugi pana la geaca
La mine totul e profi
Si ciorapii si pantofii
Si chilotii eee
Si maieuri smechere
Si masinile de top
Mafiot pe primul loc

Lee le lei la
Faima, faima, faima
Lee le lei la
Parfumu’ si haina
Hai li li lai la
Hai li li lai la
Mafia, mafia

Lee le lei la
Faima, faima, faima
Lee le lei la
Parfumu’ si haina
Hai li li lai la
Hai li li lai la
Mafia, mafia



Pe insigna mea de boss
Scrie smecher, valoros
Si pe fata si pe dos
Mafiot periculos
Am si avion privat
Cu fetite incarcat
Asta-i lux adevarat
Si-n costum si in halat
General adevarat
Incepand de la siret
Impecabil, perfect
Cu vocabular ales
Si cu mare palmares
Si cu rezonanta mare
Si-a iesit peste hotare

Lee le lei la
Faima, faima, faima
Lee le lei la
Parfumu’ si haina
Hai li li lai la
Hai li li lai la
Mafia, mafia

Lee le lei la
Faima, faima, faima
Lee le lei la
Parfumu’ si haina
Hai li li lai la
Hai li li lai la
Mafia, mafia

Trag cu sete ca-s varsator cu ascendent in taur, imi place banu’
Cand ma vede mamica la tv, zice, mama ce bine a ajuns tiganu’
Eu’s fratii roscovanu’, cu ochi albastri, pe strada tata e jidanu’
2020 compromis pentru altii, la mine tot a curs banu’
2021 la fel de bun ca 12-13-14, toti anii pana-n-coa
Vagabond citit, crescut pe strada, n-ai tu nepoate treaba cu treaba mea
Scoala mea, cu viata mea, familia mea, satra mea, sa-ti mai spun ceva
Daca ma vezi ca m-am schimbat la fata, mai bine nepoate nu te baga

NekMusic online
https://www.youtube.com/user/nekmusicproduction
https://www.facebook.com/nekmusicproduction
http://www.nekmusic.ro/

snippet.title: Boire Que du Coca Pendant 1 An : ÇA FAIT QUOI ?
snippet.description:
💥 Pour approfondir, RDV sur Poissonfecond.tv : https://www.poissonfecond.tv/
et avec le code : SARDINE, bénéficiez de 40% de réduction à vie sur votre abonnement. 
➤ L’affaire Coca Cola :https://www.poissonfecond.tv/go/AffaireCocaCola 

➤ Coca Cola la formule secrete : https://www.poissonfecond.tv/go/CocaColaFormuleSecrete

Il est pétillant, mondialement connu et 1,5 milliard de bouteilles seraient vendues… par jour !  Mais que se passerait-il si on en buvait 10 canettes par jour pendant un an ? 
 
♦  Discord : https://discord.gg/ns7j8BS
♣ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/poissonfecond
♥ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/PoissonFecond
♠ Twitter : https://twitter.com/PoissonFecond


SOURCES :
********************************
Sur les effets des sodas :
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z0PTwBLqpAE
https://www.lexpress.fr/actualite/societe/sante/boire-une-canette-de-soda-par-jour-est-dangereux-pour-le-foie_2088899.html#:~:text=Une%20alimentation%20trop%20sucrée%20et,une%20cirrhose%20ou%20un%20cancer.

Sur George Prior :
https://www.ladepeche.fr/article/2014/12/02/2003340-boit-dix-canettes-coca-jour-pendant-mois-resultat-effrayant.html

localized.title: Boire Que du Coca Pendant 1 An : ÇA FAIT QUOI ?
localized.description:
💥 Pour approfondir, RDV sur Poissonfecond.tv : https://www.poissonfecond.tv/
et avec le code : SARDINE, bénéficiez de 40% de réduction à vie sur votre abonnement. 
➤ L’affaire Coca Cola :https://www.poissonfecond.tv/go/AffaireCocaCola 

➤ Coca Cola la formule secrete : https://www.poissonfecond.tv/go/CocaColaFormuleSecrete

Il est pétillant, mondialement connu et 1,5 milliard de bouteilles seraient vendues… par jour !  Mais que se passerait-il si on en buvait 10 canettes par jour pendant un an ? 
 
♦  Discord : https://discord.gg/ns7j8BS
♣ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/poissonfecond
♥ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/PoissonFecond

snippet.title: Confused Mercedes 'slower than Red Bull' - F1 testing's big lessons
snippet.description:
F1 testing was shorter than ever in 2021, giving the teams just three days to get themselves ready for the new season. Things look good for Red Bull, but is Mercedes really on the back foot? Scott Mitchell looks at the fortunes of the two teams at the front of the grid, and picks out the other things we've learned from F1 pre-season in Bahrain

READ MORE HERE
https://the-race.com/formula-1/mercedes-flatlines-red-bull-soars-mark-hughes-analysis/

snippet.title: Çukur 4.Sezon 28.Bölüm
snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve çok daha fazlası puhutv'de → https://puhutv.com/cukur-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=cukur&utm_content=detay

Çukur'a Abone Olmak İçin → https://bit.ly/cukur-dd-sub

4.Sezon 28. Bölüm Özet:

Yamaç ve Amca arasındaki gerilim iyice tırmanırken, iki tarafın savaşı artık resmiyet kazanacak. Efsun’un yapacağı sürpriz hamle kendisini tehlikeye sokarken bu durum Yamaç’ı harekete geçirecek. Vartolu’nun oğlunun sünnet düğünü iki tarafı da bir araya getirecek. Hayatta kalması için gerekli olan tek güvencenin elinden alındığını öğrenen Kulkan, bir kez daha Amca ile pazarlık masasına oturacak. Yamaç ve Cumali’nin Amca'ya karşı düzenledikleri aksiyon dolu planı nefesleri kesecek.

Yönetmen: Sinan Öztürk
Senaryo: Gökhan Horzum, Damla Serim
Yapımcı: Kerem Çatay
İdari Yapımcı: Yamaç Okur
Müzik: Toygar Işıklı
2. Yönetmen: Barbaros Bilgin
Görüntü Yönetmeni: Tolga Kutluay
Sanat Yönetmeni: Oya Köseoğlu

OYUNCULAR
Yamaç: Aras Bulut İynemli
Sultan: Perihan Savaş
Cumali Amca: Müfit Kayacan
Vartolu: Erkan Kolçak Köstendil
Aliço: Rıza Kocaoğlu
Cumali: Necip Memili
Efsun: Damla Sönmez
Celasun: Kubilay Aka
Akın: Burak Dakak
Damla: Hare Sürel

Nedim: İlkay Akdağlı

snippet.title: Harry et Meghan: l’interview qui accuse la couronne
snippet.description: Harry et Meghan, c’est l’interview dont tout le monde parle. BFMTV vous en montre de larges extraits. Des soupçons de racisme au sein de la famille royale, la dépression de la duchesse de Sussex, ou encore les relations très tendues entre Harry et son père, le prince Charles… Retour sur cette interview menée par la présentatrice super-star de la télévision américaine, Oprah Winfrey, à Los Angeles où vivent Harry et Meghan. Un récit de Sandra Boulanger et Laura Bleuzen.
